transcript.clean_text: what a day it turned out to be we had a brave breakaway that decided that they were going to take it on and in fact their bravery was matched by those that bridge to them Thomas de Ghent and Dario Cataldo from Astana decided to come and join the merry band of Gonzalez from Oscar the mauryas here in the lime green the dark green of carro al was represented by Jonathon vastra who actually had some fun in some of the sprints and indeed the climbs zammis from Burgos and indeed zbrush a BA from Dimension Data also up there again made his move and we're speculating as to whether it might stick Derick Cataldo decided to come and join him but my goodness we were heading for a brutal finale won't me mat it the sort of terrain that just takes a bite out ya know the sort of day that leaves the legs stinging of these five ascents and this is one of the easier days today with this is the penultimate climb of the day and that topped out with 22 case to go it was a Team Sky in particularly facility lianca and a me Hulk Witkowski setting the tempo trying to reduce the bunch but this are the early brutal slopes of the final climb of the day which was to be the defining point of the stage I'm afraid was was leading in for a little while but the duties were exchanging between lotto yumbo Bora had to interest quickstep floors naturally but lots of young Bo were trying to tee up Rockledge and indeed quickstep ala Philippe and guess what it was that pair that into the the first little push my narrow Quintana and in fact they left him in their wake - punchy for Quintana prefers a much longer Alpine test and it was the explosive pairing of our Philippe and rod which starting off amongst today's favorites that lived up to that billing in fact when they Crested and headed home katana was looking for support or indeed company on what was to be a gnarly descent roman bar day picked it up for Ag tour LeMond deal he tried to close down its french bragging rights don't forget on well it's always an important part of the season there's never anything but I think it's fair to say ala Philippe though had the mindset to deliver this one he and Rockledge battled out rot which almost forced by the Frenchman to take the lead he came round in late ala Philippe not exactly holding his line but quite frankly he was writing a script for himself hello Bilbao it was trust and how that came over the line spectacularly so ahead of Enric max of quickstep who was backup - ala Philippe Gorka is a gear you
